goal.objective: Enhance the lint report UI so pyslang/verilator diagnostics are grouped by error type with counts, expandable details, constrained layout, and clickable diagnostics that open RTL source with an inline explanation under the failing line.

note: The active Codex goal in this thread was already the completed lint goal, not the Perforce ulw-loop objective. The Perforce objective is tracked and completed through the OMO ulw-loop session ledger/checkpoint.
